sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الضِّيَافَةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra osnovnim dijelom arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered an essential part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَقْبِلُ العَرَبُ ضُيُوفَهُمْ بِحَفَاوَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Arapi s velikom toplinom dočekuju goste u svojim domovima.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs welcome guests into their homes with great warmth.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ المُضِيفُ القَهْوَةَ العَرَبِيَّةَ وَالتَّمْرَ لِلضَّيْفِ عِنْدَ وُصُولِهِ.
sentences.translation: Domaćin gostu po dolasku nudi arapsku kafu i hurme.
sentences.translationEn: The host offers Arabic coffee and dates to the guest upon arrival.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَهْتَمُّ الجَمِيعُ بِتَوْفِيرِ الرَّاحَةِ التَّامَّةِ لِلزَّائِرِ.
sentences.translation: Također, svi se brinu o pružanju potpune udobnosti posjetitelju.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone is also concerned with providing complete comfort to the visitor.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّقْلِيدُ يُعَبِّرُ عَنِ الكَرَمِ وَالاحْتِرَامِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ova tradicija izražava plemenitost i poštovanje među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: This tradition expresses generosity and respect among people.
